skills.title: Technical Skills
skills.subtitle: Core Languages, Distributed Systems, AI, and Cloud
skills.description: Senior Software Engineer specializing in production-grade AI pipelines and scalable, event-driven microservices.

work.title: Work Experience
work.subtitle: Senior SWE, SE & Associate SWE @ Talview (2023 - Present)

roles.title: Senior Software Engineer
highlights: Architected technical roadmaps across multiple squads by authoring Architecture Decision Records (ADRs), reducing technical debt.
Built custom CI/CD tooling for automated code review enforcement, cutting manual review turnaround by 35% across the deployment pipeline.
Led product grooming and sprint planning for the core proctoring squad, translating complex technical epics into well-scoped tasks.
Developed a multimodal RAG support agent (Azure OpenAI, LangChain) that analyzes candidate text queries and screenshots to instantly troubleshoot live assessment issues.

roles.title: Software Engineer
highlights: Spearheaded "Alvy," a patented agentic AI proctor using LLMs, Vision Models, and LlamaIndex for multimodal reasoning — achieving 90% human parity in malpractice detection.
Designed real-time object detection pipelines for video, audio, and screen feeds using LLMs and native ML models.
Scaled live interview and proctoring infrastructure to 1M+ annual sessions using Twilio, LiveKit, and Azure Communication Services.
Built secure remote assessment pipelines integrating facial recognition, photo-ID verification, and dual-camera environment monitoring.

roles.title: Associate Software Engineer
highlights: Worked on event-driven microservices with Node.js, Kafka, Temporal, and GraphQL supporting 5,000+ concurrent examination sessions.
Integrated enterprise proctoring workflows into 5+ global LMS platforms (Moodle, Canvas, Brightspace, Intellum, etc) via LTI protocols and custom browser extensions.
Built a high-throughput video transcoding service converting MKV/MKA to MP4, reducing composition costs by 20%.
Optimized revenue operations by integrating Stripe and Lemon Squeezy for end-to-end certification purchasing.

roles.title: Engineering Intern
highlights: Reduced API response latency by 40% for data-intensive operations by migrating legacy REST endpoints to GraphQL.
Integrated Sentry distributed tracing across PHP and Node.js applications, cutting incident triage time by 50%.
Increased test coverage from 40% to 75% for mission-critical modules by introducing Jest and TDD methodologies.
Automated HR leave workflows via a Slack BoltJS + AWS Lambda integration, reducing processing time by 90%.

contributions.title: blocknote-py (Python)
contributions.subtitle: Creator & Maintainer (2025)
contributions.description: Created an open-source library (3k+ downloads) that enables seamless parsing and manipulation of BlockNote block-structured documents on backend systems.
contributions.subdescription: Built with strict Test-Driven Development (TDD) pipelines and Pydantic schemas, ensuring full compatibility with nesting models and block data translations.

publications.title: Research Publication
publications.paper: "Fine-Grained Classification for Emotion Detection Using Advanced Neural Models and GoEmotions Dataset"
publications.description: Co-authored paper evaluating classification layers. RoBERTa achieved F1-score of 0.8458 in gratitude detection, outperforming BERT and CNN models.
